Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Dowling.

Horold Auerbach, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff(s) Haas & Najarian, LLP
Plaintiff's Witness Robert Nicholes was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Delamore Companies LLC. for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $194,573.46
Prejudgment Interest - $45,153.57
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00
Costs - $810.00
Total judgment in the amount of $241,537.03

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
